intro.title: <role>Software Engineer</role>. Curious by nature, obsessed with <essence>essence</essence>
intro.description: I'm Pietro Rhyan - a Software Engineer with over 5 years of experience building web solutions. I enjoy analyzing the best ways to solve a problem, suggesting product improvements and cracking questionable jokes. I've been venturing into UX/UI Design.

personal.title: Personal
personal.item0: Read more books this year (next up: Metamorphosis - Franz Kafka, The Little Prince - Antoine de Saint-Exupéry)
personal.item1: Get back to playing freestyle football
personal.item2: Move to a big city (São Paulo, Floripa, Curitiba, Goiânia, Aracaju, etc.)
personal.item3: Travel to other countries and experience new cultures
personal.item5: Pick up a hobby I haven't mastered yet (playing acoustic/electric guitar)
personal.item6: Return to college and finish my degree

professional.title: Career
professional.item0: Obtain an English certification of at least C1
professional.item1: Take a course focused on Software Architecture
professional.item3: Work and get paid in a strong currency (e.g., USD)
professional.item4: Learn and build a project in .NET
professional.item5: Sharpen my skills and earn a Design certification
professional.item6: Improve my skills and develop a mobile project with React Native and, later on, with a dedicated language (Kotlin and/or Swift)

aboutmeContent.paragraph1: I was introduced to the world of software development when I enrolled in the IT program at the Federal Institute of Bahia in 2017. Building apps, drawing software architecture diagrams, and wrestling with pointers in C++ and more — I fell in love with this field and kept wanting to learn more.
aboutmeContent.paragraph2: I took part in programming competitions, where I was runner-up in one of the editions — I used to compete with friends over who could write the most efficient program with the fewest lines (haha), and we'd team up to build websites and other things. Experiences that pushed me out of my comfort zone and helped me apply new knowledge to real situations.
aboutmeContent.paragraph3: In 2021 I started my Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. That same year I made it through a selection process to become a trainee at a tech company in Fortaleza, which offered me a scholarship I could use to take courses outside of university as well.
aboutmeContent.paragraph4: In 2022 I co-founded Fros Venture with friends — a really cool project we built to gain real-world experience that helped us a great deal. During 2023 I went through some tough personal situations that forced me to put college on hold. Despite the challenges, it's the problems we face in life that push us to reach new levels. I was able to work in IT at my city's government office, and in 2024 I joined a company in Santa Catarina as a Frontend Developer — a role I still hold today, making suggestions that impact thousands of clients and leading the development of several features.

languages.content: Javascript, Typescript, Python, C++, React, Next.js, Angular, Node.js;

devops.content: Docker, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, AWS;

architecture.content: Microservices, Monoliths, Clean Architecture, SOLID, DDD, TDD, Clean Code, MVVM, Hexagonal, KISS;

agile.content: Scrum & Kanban via Jira, Azure DevOps and Linear.
